Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 045. In the Land of Habhu (ABL 0173)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

a-na LUGAL EN-ia

(1) To the king, my lord: your servant Ṭab-šar-Aššur. Good health to the king, my lord!

o 22

ARAD-ka mDÙG.GA—⸢IM*—aš-šur*⸣

o 33

lu DI-mu a-na LUGAL EN-ia

o 44

UD 27-KÁM LÚ.GAL—ki-ṣir

(4) A cohort commander of the Chief Eunuch delivered me the king's sealed message in the city of Anisu on the 27th.

o 55

ša LÚ.GAL—SAG un-qi LUGAL

o 66

ina ŠÀ URU.a-ni-su ina UGU-ḫi-ia

o 77

na-ṣa LÚ.A—KIN ša GAL*—⸢bir*-te*⸣

(7) The messenger of the commander of the fort came to me in Anisu; I asked him about the news, and he told me this: "The city of Birate and the whole land of Habhu are well; everybody is doing his work."

o 88

ina ŠÀ URU.a-ni-su ina UGU-ḫi-ia

o 99

it-tal-ka a-na UGU ṭè-e-me a-sa-al-šú

o 1010

ma-a DI-mu a-na URU.bir-a-te

o 1111

ma-a KUR.ḫab-ḫu gab-bu ia-mu-tu

o 1212

du₆-lu-šú e-pa-áš

o 1313

DI-mu a—dan-niš

(13) All is well; the king, my lord, can be glad.

o 1414

lib-bu ša LUGAL EN-ia lu DÙG.GA

Bottom
b.e.b.e. edge uninscribed

Reverse
r 1r 1

UD 28-KÁM ina URU.ie-ri

(r 1) On the 28th I shall be in the city of Ieri.

r 22

a-na-ku

rest uninscribed

(SPACER)

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P334118/.
